title: One Day App Development Challenge 2026
description: Second annual ODADC hosted by SIREN. Below are official resources, event artwork, and the project showcase. Kickoff presentation PDF and video are large files; add hosted URLs in this JSON when you publish them elsewhere.
kickoffNote: Full kickoff recording (~40 MB) is omitted from the repo to keep clones small. Upload to YouTube or PNW media and set kickoffVideoUrl in odadc/2026.json, or distribute offline.

projects.title: Project titles coming soon
